listing.name: TNL Intelligence
listing.description: Evidence-first news intelligence and cited research from The Neural Ledger.

toolInventory.title: Research what changed
toolInventory.description: Compare a selected period with its baseline and cite material changes.

toolInventory.title: Compare event sources
toolInventory.description: Compare agreement, omissions, contradictions, framing, and timing across sources.

toolInventory.title: Validate an event
toolInventory.description: Corroborate a selected event and return a bounded verification state.

toolInventory.title: Research asset and entity exposure
toolInventory.description: Map documented and inferred exposure paths, horizons, and counterfactors.

toolInventory.title: Research geopolitical and operational risk
toolInventory.description: Build bounded scenarios, leading indicators, assumptions, and impact paths.

toolInventory.title: Research weekly consequential developments
toolInventory.description: Deduplicate and rank a selected week using cited materiality evidence.

starterPrompts: What changed in the semiconductor supply chain over the last seven days?
Validate the selected TNL event against primary and independent sources.
Create a cited brief of the most consequential developments from the last week.
